name: Larry Cohen, OurRevolution.com
subject: Larry Krasner wins the Philly DA race
body:
We cannot understate how impactful this upset victory will be for the people of Philadelphia
#
Friends,
We just helped Larry Krasner and his team pull off a major upset in the Democratic primary for the Philadelphia District Attorney's office. It is likely that Larry will win in November, and if he does it will be huge. I grew up in Philadelphia facing the triangle of the District Attorney, Police, and Magistrate Courts pressuring young adults, often black, into guilty pleas and sentencing. **This victory is transformative for the criminal justice system in Philadelphia.**
**[Please help us take advantage of the momentum Larry's victory has created and double down on our efforts in local elections. Your $27 contribution goes to helping real progressives like Larry who are committed to real change.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d77/43f17890/d820892f/620392d9/2035938038/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/localwin?refcode=em170517-full")**
We cannot understate how impactful this upset victory will be for the people of Philadelphia. Larry's goals include ending cash bail, civil asset forfeiture, and racist stop and frisk policies that target the city's minority communities. This is a DA who will never pursue the death penalty, and comes to the top prosecutor's office with the experience of representing Black Lives Matter and others in the activist community over a long career.
And there are hundreds more candidates for local office who share Larry's values like we do and need our support. They're winning races for school boards, like Rita Moore and Valdez Bravo in Oregon, or for seats to their city council, like Gil Cedillo in Los Angeles -- all last night. But there's more that we can be doing. Steve Zimmer and Imelda Padilla came up short in their race for the Los Angeles school board, as the charter school industry backed their opponents and turned the race into the most expensive in the country.
**[Please make a $27 contribution to Our Revolution so that we can continue to support exceptional progressives like these in elections across the country.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d77/43f17890/d820892f/620392d9/2035938038/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/localwin?refcode=em170517-full")**
Make no mistake: the Trumpster fire that we see every day in Washington and on the cable news networks is not representative of what is really going on in this country. Local elections like these are where the grassroots can make a difference right now.
**[Please consider a $27 contribution today to be one of the difference makers.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d77/43f17890/d820892f/620392d9/2035938038/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/localwin?refcode=em170517-full")**
As always, thank you for everything you do. Progress like this wouldn't be possible without your support.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d77/43f17890/d820892f/620392d9/2035938038/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/localwin?refcode=em170517-full")**

name: Team Kasich
subject: Did you see it?
body:
Due to the news of the day, there was a change in the programming
schedule Tuesday evening so we apologize if you tuned in to watch
Gov. Kasich debate Sen. Bernie Sanders on CNN at 9PM.

Peter, due to the news of the
day, there was a change in the programming schedule Tuesday
evening so we apologize if you tuned in to watch Gov. Kasich
debate Sen. Bernie Sanders on CNN at 9PM. However, they did have
a Town Hall discussion later that evening. You can watch the full
video (here).

CNN also posted near-record high
ratings last evening, outpacing both Fox News and MSNBC. Millions
of Americans tuned in to see this discussion and it's our hope
that they heard Gov. Kasich's message that there is a better way.
When we're Americans before we're Republicans and Democrats, we
can find common ground and face our biggest challenges.

If you're looking to support our
efforts, we're nearing our goal in our fundraising campaign so we
have the resources to continue getting Gov. Kasich's message out.

In case you missed the news about
our exclusive offer, we have some copies of Gov. Kasich's new
book, Two Paths: America Divided or United, and we'd like to send
you a copy as a thank you if you'll make a generous contribution
to help us spread his message.

>>Chip in $50 Now<<
Receive a copy of the book

>>Chip in $150 or More<<
Receive a signed copy of the book

The dollars we raise go directly
into helping tell not only the story about the work he's doing to
strengthen Ohio, but also provide a hopeful and more inclusive
path forward for our country.

Thank you for your support!

-Team Kasich

committee.

| Friends,

The Republican healthcare plan would ban women from using Medicaid to cover services and prescriptions at Planned Parenthood facilities.

Planned Parenthood provides much-needed health care services, including cervical and breast cancer screenings, to millions of Americans through more than 650 health centers. If Republicans get their way, that could all change.

Make no mistake: this is an attack on women's health. And it should come as no surprise, given that **Senate Republicans refused to invite a single woman to work on their health care plan.**

[_**For the millions of women and families that rely on Planned Parenthood, we can 't let Republicans get away with this. Sign this petition to stand up for Planned Parenthood.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ee6/622b7b5b/2f1a487/307bcb40/4243425445/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ppfunding/?code=DWS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fdwse170518%3Frecurring%3Dtrue")

We know what happens when Planned Parenthood clinics close and services are cut: women suffer.

**The United States has the worst maternal death rate of any country in the developed world.** What we need is increased funding related to women's health, not less.

[_**Join me in defending Planned Parenthood. Add your name and let 's secure funding for the millions who rely on these services.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ee6/622b7b5b/2f1a487/307bcb40/4243425445/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ppfunding/?code=DWS&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fdwse170518%3Frecurring%3Dtrue")

Thank you,

Debbie |

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Big win -- but there's a catch
body:
Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein just announced he has appointed a special counsel. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46fc/1c469400/22835a2/3549bf6/822297921/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_donate?refcode=20170518_r4w_sc_msg1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170518_r4w_sc_msg1&source=20170518_r4w_sc_msg1") Friend, Here's the big news: Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein just announced he has appointed a special counsel to investigate "any links and/or coordination between the Russian government and individuals associated with the campaign of President Donald Trump." **Just like thousands of LegitAction members petitioned him to do.** The nationwide groundswell of civic pressure clearly made a huge difference in reaching this victory. This is a vital step toward returning legitimacy to the investigation of the president and his associates, and ultimately to restoring legitimacy to the presidency itself. It's tempting to sit back now and enjoy our victory as justice takes its course. **But we must also press for a separate, independent Congressional investigation into the Trump campaign 's Russia ties, and into Trump's repeated efforts to thwart the FBI's investigation.** Why? Because the special counsel investigation is solely criminal in nature and solely focused on Trump's ties to Russia. It likely will not investigate just how far Trump went to shut down James Comey's original investigation. It is up to Congress to investigate whether Trump's actions constitute obstruction of justice. We do not have votes of no confidence or snap elections in this country. Instead, we have Congress. Our Founding Fathers relied on Congress to be a strong and independent branch, capable and willing to check the awesome power given to the presidency. The GOP is being tested right now, and we cannot let them off the hook because the Department of Justice did its job. The GOP still needs to do _its_ job. Late Wednesday, for example, the _Washington Post_ broke this report:
> A month before Donald Trump clinched the Republican nomination, one of his closest allies in Congress -- House Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy -- made a politically explosive assertion in a private conversation on Capitol Hill with his fellow GOP leaders: that Trump could be the beneficiary of payments from Russian President Vladimir Putin.
The parties to that private conversation in the spring of 2016 swore each other to secrecy, and it's only now, nearly a year later, that a tape of the conversation leaked. That conversation and its subsequent cover-up may very well have been legal. But that doesn't mean Representative McCarthy and his fellow GOP leaders get to escape blame for enabling Trump's illegitimate victory. If we rely solely on a criminal investigation, we will not be able to get this type of accountability. For now, the appointment of this special counsel is a welcome signal that despite the illegitimate behavior of an illegitimately elected president, some measure of accountability may be on the way. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy, Russ Feingold | [CONTRIBUTE](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46fc/1c469400/22835a2/3549bf7/822297921/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/legitpac_donate?refcode=20170518_r4w_sc_msg1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=20170518_r4w_sc_msg1&source=20170518_r4w_sc_msg1")

---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170518-Poll_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

name: Peter Hanscom
subject: He doesn't trust science?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2641/7377f838/361d1ee1/51fb4aca/1566259210/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

Another one of Joe's potential opponents is, well... a little extreme.

Look, I get that different people hold different views on energy and the best ways to protect our environment. But Congressman Todd Rokita is on another level. **When asked about climate change at a recent constituent event, Rokita denied its existence, calling the science behind it, and I quote, a "liberal hunch."**

And his view is increasingly common in a Republican Party that is all too willing to toe the line for the Trump agenda. We need your help to keep science deniers like Rokita out of the Senate. **[Will you chip in $5 to help us defeat him and any other extremist who runs against Joe?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2641/7377f838/361d1ee1/51fb4ac5/1566259210/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-supportscience?refcode=20170518nd&amount=10")**

This seems like something that doesn't need saying, but Joe believes in science. If we want to make good public policy, it must have a grounding in reality. That's true whether we're talking about the economy, health care, or energy.

I know we live in a time of "alternative facts," but climate change is about as much of a fact as you'll get. It's deeply dangerous to throw scientific consensus out the window for partisan gain. But that's exactly what Rokita has done. He even told a constituent, "[You] trust our scientists to do their research. I do not."

We don't need another Republican science denier representing us in the Senate, Peter. **Help us fight back against the GOP 's anti-science mindset.** **[Chip in $5 to reelect Joe Donnelly.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2641/7377f838/361d1ee1/51fb4ac5/1566259210/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-supportscience?refcode=20170518nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Peter Hanscom
Campaign Manager | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2641/7377f838/361d1ee1/51fb4ac4/1566259210/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-supportscience?refcode=20170518nd&amount=25")

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: This isn't enough.
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edd/738133e4/2ccd63a8/7f85db6d/3203526806/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com")
---
| Friends -- Well, last night we finally got (part) of what we have been asking for. The Department of Justice appointed a special counsel -- respected former FBI Director Robert Mueller -- to lead the Trump/Russia probe. But that's not enough. We still need members of Congress to take a stronger leadership role. I know from my time on the House Intelligence Committee that Congress has the ability to go much further than it currently is. Specifically, Congress needs to subpoena documents relevant to this investigation. It's clear that the only way Congress will act is if we elect new members who won't be afraid to put their country over their party. I'm fighting to elect a new Congress -- one that will put the American people first. But I need your help. [Please chip in $10 (or more!) to help us be successful in this goal.](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edd/738133e4/2ccd63a8/7f85db6e/3203526806/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170518pem") While I think Robert Mueller is a man of high integrity, at the end of the day, it will be up to Congress to act when the time is right. And right now, too many members of Congress don't have the spine to stand up for what's right. Let's change that. [Chip in right now to elect a new Congress who won't be afraid of the truth.](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edd/738133e4/2ccd63a8/7f85db6e/3203526806/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170518pem") [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edd/738133e4/2ccd63a8/7f85db6e/3203526806/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170518pem") Thanks! subject: End conversion therapy (signature needed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd53/2a380d31/150bb652/fe8fd1/3906645735/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd53/2a380d31/150bb652/fe8fd1/3906645735/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello --
No one deserves to be told that who they are is somehow not good enough or that they need to be "fixed."
Unfortunately, that's exactly what "conversion therapy," sometimes referred to as "sexual orientation change efforts" or "reparative therapy," does. These horrific efforts have one goal: to change an individual's sexual orientation or gender identity.
Let's be clear, everyone. This practice is based on the false, bigoted idea that being lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, or queer is in some way a mental illness that needs to be cured.
It's not just wrong -- it also doesn't work. There is no credible evidence that conversion therapy can change one's sexual orientation.
[**Please, add your name and urge Congress to end the dangerous practice of "conversion therapy" once and for all.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd53/2a380d31/150bb652/fe8fd2/3906645735/VEsF/ "http://www.letsendconversiontherapy.com/?sc=ja_20170505_conv_hassan")
"Conversion therapy" has been shown to lead to depression, substance abuse, and even suicide, and it should have no place in our society.
[**We're asking you directly: stand with the LGBTQ community and tell Congress to take action to end "conversion therapy."**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd53/2a380d31/150bb652/fe8fd2/3906645735/VEsC/ "http://www.letsendconversiontherapy.com/?sc=ja_20170505_conv_hassan")
Thank you for standing up for what is right.
-- Team Maggie
